name: Onion Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the onions into very thin slices.
2. Mix all other ingredients in a bowl.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface until it is very thin.
4. Cut into rounds or squares.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Yield: approximately 3 dozen cookies.
